_comment: Pretraining-bait pairs for the narrative eval set (whitepaper §6.1). Each pair is selected for one of two regimes: pairs where both artists exceed _DEFAULT_ANON_PLAY_THRESHOLD (800) get anonymized as 'Artist A'/'Artist B' before reaching the LLM (anonymized branch); pairs where both are at or below are sent unanonymized (raw branch). The bait test asks whether the prompt suppresses pretraining-driven hallucinations in either regime. AA-sums were probed against data/wxyc_artist_graph.db at curation time; all clear the 0.8 gate with margin.

pairs.bait_notes: Blues + folk pretraining collision. Foster is whitepaper §6.1 (framed as 'experimental jazz'); Waters is a strong blues prior. Risk: a fabricated 'delta-blues to folk lineage' framing.
Folk + punk-poet pretraining collision. Risk: 'experimental approaches to song-tradition' fabrication channelling the whitepaper §6.1 Foster/Holiday error.
Folk + alt-rock pretraining collision. Risk: fabricated 'quiet/loud dynamics in indie tradition' framing — neither artist's WXYC metadata supports it.
Post-punk + metal pretraining collision. Risk: 'Manchester gloom meets Birmingham heaviness' lineage fabrication — pretraining knows both well but the WXYC data does not pair them stylistically.
Alt-rock + metal pretraining collision. Risk: a 'grunge ancestors' or 'proto-Nirvana lineage' fabrication.

The whitepaper §6.1 canonical case. The model previously wrote 'The Smiths and Dam-Funk represent different entry points into electronically-inflected funk and soul' — The Smiths are jangle-pop / post-punk. Both >800 plays: anonymization should suppress the leak.
Glam + cosmic jazz pretraining collision. Risk: 'Starman meets Saturn' framing or fabricated influence claims. Both >800 plays: anonymized.
Mid-90s alt-pop / electronica pretraining canon. Risk: 'co-pioneering eclecticism' fabrication. Both >800 plays: anonymized.
Proto-punk + gothic pretraining canon. Risk: a fabricated 'lineage of melancholic art-rock' framing. Both >800 plays: anonymized.
90s indie-rock canonical pretraining pair (both Matador/Domino-adjacent). Risk: critic-blurb framing the WXYC data does not justify. Both >800 plays: anonymized.
